title: Toasted Smoky Ukrainian Peanut Flatbread
description: A smoky and aerated Ukrainian dish featuring roasted peanuts, this flatbread is a nostalgic treat with a Mediterranean twist, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, chopped peanuts, smoked paprika, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the dough circles with olive oil and cook for 2 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Repeat with the remaining dough pieces.
Serve the toasted flatbread warm, folded in half or into quarters.
